```{r}
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
    ungroup() 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value<0.05) %>%
  # mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed relative abundance of genera. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

table_export(summaries_df, "taxonomic_analysis_table_")
``` 

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=16}
sigtaxa = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05, term=="WOL") %>% pull(Taxa)
plotme %>% filter(Taxa %in% sigtaxa) %>%
  # filter(!(Taxa %in% c("Proteobacteria Klebsiella", "Proteobacteria Enterobacter", "Proteobacteria Enterobacterales", "Proteobacteria Enterobacteriaceae"))) %>% # show only taxa that were classified to the species level for main text figure
  left_join(summaries_df %>% 
              filter(term=="WOL") %>% 
              mutate(q_label = ifelse(fdr>=0.05, "n.s.", ifelse(fdr<0.0001, 
                                      paste0("q=", scientific(fdr, digits = 2)), paste0("q=", as.character(signif(fdr, digits = 2)))))), by = c("Taxa", "growth_failure") ) %>%
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(props), min=min(props)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=growth_failure, y=props)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill=factor(WOL)), outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.shape = 21,
                 position=position_dodge(0.9), lwd=0.25, outlier.color = NA) +
    geom_text(mapping = aes(label = q_label, x=growth_failure, y=10), size = 3, check_overlap = T) +
  # plotme %>%
  # ggplot(aes(x=growth_failure, y=props)) +
  #   geom_boxplot(aes(fill=factor(WOL)), outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.shape = 21) +
    # geom_text(mapping = aes(label = paste0("q=", scientific(fdr, digits = 2)), x=12, y=max*0.96), size = 3, check_overlap = T) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxalabel, ncol=2) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(alpha=0.8) +
    # scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0.5), transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(y="Relative abundance (log scale)", fill="WOL", x="Growth failure") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), strip.background = element_blank())

ggsave(here("Output", "SUPP_FIG1F_taxaRA_growthfail_WOL_boxplots.pdf"), width =8, height = 16, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

## Week by week  
### SPECIES
Is there a week where the groups diverge?  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

Growth Faltering:  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +

    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, fdr>=0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")
summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

Growth Failure:  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>0.05, p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```


### GENUS  
Growth Faltering:  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +

    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, fdr>=0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")
summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

Growth Failure:  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>0.05, p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```



## Monthly 
### SPECIES
Is there a week where the groups diverge?  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

Growth Faltering:  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(MOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, MOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(MOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +

    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, fdr>=0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")
summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

Growth Failure:  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(MOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, MOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(MOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>0.05, p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```


### GENUS  
Growth Faltering:  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +

    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, fdr>=0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")
summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

Growth Failure:  
Asterisk/star for fdr-adjusted p-value<0.05. Diamond for p-unadjusted<0.05  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(Taxa, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = reorder(Taxa, -log10_props)) %>%
  # mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, Taxa, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_props), sd=sd(log10_props), n=n(), max=max(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>0.05, p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^max +.2, color=term), shape=23) +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^max +.4), shape=8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```




## Continuous trajectories over age  
### SPECIES
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group * WOL"
myform_covariates="log10_props ~ log_npo_days_prop + bwt_z + study_group * WOL"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, npo_days_prop, bwt_z) %>% mutate(log_npo_days_prop = log10(npo_days_prop + min(s2$npo_days_prop[s2$npo_days_prop>0])/2)), form1 = myform, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

# summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), p.value<0.05)
props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```


```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=6}
sigtaxa <- summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% pull(Taxa)
tmp=summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% mutate(siggroup = gsub("study_group|:WOL", "", term)) %>% mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = siggroup, levels = c("none", "mild retardation", "moderate to severe retardation"), labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>% mutate(ypos=if_else(Taxa == "Firmicutes Clostridium perfringens", 1e-5, 1e-5))

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), Taxa %in% sigtaxa) %>%
  # ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
  #   geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
  #   geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = study_group, labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`, group = `Growth Faltering`), se = F) +  
    geom_label(data = tmp, aes(x=2200, y=ypos, color=`Growth Faltering`, label = paste("q=", signif(fdr, 2))), fill=NA, show.legend = FALSE) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = as.character(ann_colors$growth_cat)) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=10, color="black", face="italic"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  facet_wrap(~gsub("Firmicutes |Proteobacteria ", "", Taxa), ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Relative Abundance", x="Hours of Life")

ggsave(here("Output", "SUPPFIG4B_speciesRA_GrFaltering.pdf"), width=6, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

WITH COVARIATES: `r myform_covariates`   
```{r}
myform_covariates="log10_props ~ log_npo_days_prop + bwt_z + study_group * WOL"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, npo_days_prop, bwt_z) %>% mutate(log_npo_days_prop = log10(npo_days_prop + min(s2$npo_days_prop[s2$npo_days_prop>0])/2)), form1 = myform_covariates, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05)

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1, grepl(":", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with fdr < 0.1 and only interaction terms. Full formula: {myform_covariates}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
```


```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
# GROWTH FAILURE
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), form1 = myform, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
rm(myform)

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    facet_wrap(~Taxa, ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
sigtaxa <- summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% pull(Taxa)
tmp=summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% mutate(siggroup = gsub("study_group|:WOL", "", term)) %>% mutate(ypos=if_else(Taxa=="Proteobacteria Enterobacteriaceae", 1e-5, if_else(Taxa=="Firmicutes Staphylococcus epidermidis", 0.2, 1e-6)))

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), Taxa %in% sigtaxa) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    geom_label(data = tmp, aes(x=2100, y=ypos, color=siggroup, label = paste("q=", signif(fdr, 2))), fill=NA, show.legend = F) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    facet_wrap(~gsub("Firmicutes |Proteobacteria ", "", Taxa), ncol=3, scales="free") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=10, color="black", face="italic"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  labs(y="Relative Abundance", color="Growth Failure")

ggsave(here("Output", "SUPPFIG2B_speciesRA_GrFailure.pdf"), width=6, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

WITH COVARIATES: `r myform_covariates`   
```{r}
myform_covariates="log10_props ~ study_group * WOL + log_npo_days_prop + bwt_z"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, npo_days_n, npo_days_prop, bwt_z) %>% mutate(log_npo_days_prop = log10(npo_days_prop + min(s2$npo_days_prop[s2$npo_days_prop>0])/2)), form1 = myform_covariates, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1, grepl(":", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with fdr < 0.1 and only interaction terms. Full formula: {myform_covariates}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
```

### GENUS  
#### NEW Supp Fig 2 (12/18/25)   
```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_props ~ study_group * WOL"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest_g, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), form1 = myform, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

sigtaxa <- summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% pull(Taxa)
tmp=summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% mutate(siggroup = gsub("study_group|:WOL", "", term)) %>% mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = siggroup, levels = c("none", "mild retardation", "moderate to severe retardation"), labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>% mutate(ypos=if_else(Taxa == "Proteobacteria Escherichia", 1e-5, 1e-6))

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), Taxa %in% sigtaxa) %>%
  # ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
  #   geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
  #   geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = study_group, labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`, group = `Growth Faltering`), se = F) +  
    geom_label(data = tmp, aes(x=1900, y=ypos, color=`Growth Faltering`, label = paste("q=", signif(fdr, 2))), fill=NA, show.legend = FALSE) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = as.character(ann_colors$growth_cat)) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=10, color="black", face="italic"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  facet_wrap(~gsub("Firmicutes |Proteobacteria ", "", Taxa), ncol=3, scales="free") +
  labs(y="Relative Abundance", x="Hours of Life")

ggsave(here("Output", "SUPPFIG2A_genusRA_GrFaltering.pdf"), width=8, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

WITH COVARIATES: `r myform_covariates`   
```{r}
myform_covariates="log10_props ~ log_npo_days_prop + bwt_z + study_group * WOL"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest_g, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, npo_days_prop, bwt_z) %>% mutate(log_npo_days_prop = log10(npo_days_prop + min(s2$npo_days_prop[s2$npo_days_prop>0])/2)), form1 = myform_covariates, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05)

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1, grepl(":", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with fdr < 0.1 and only interaction terms. Full formula: {myform_covariates}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
```


```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=6}
# GROWTH FAILURE
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest_g, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), form1 = myform, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
rm(myform)

sigtaxa <- summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% pull(Taxa)
tmp=summaries_df %>% filter(grepl(":", term), fdr<0.1) %>% mutate(siggroup = gsub("study_group|:WOL", "", term)) %>% mutate(ypos=if_else(Taxa=="Firmicutes Staphylococcus", 0.5, 1e-6))

props_toTest_g %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, HOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), Taxa %in% sigtaxa) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=props, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group), se = F) +  
    geom_label(data = tmp, aes(x=2100, y=ypos, color=siggroup, label = paste("q=", signif(fdr, 2))), fill=NA, show.legend = F) + 
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", labels = scales::percent) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    facet_wrap(~gsub("Firmicutes |Proteobacteria ", "", Taxa), ncol=3, scales="free") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=10, color="black", face="italic"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  labs(y="Relative Abundance", color="Growth Failure")

ggsave(here("Output", "SUPPFIG2A_genusRA_GrFailure.pdf"), width=6, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

WITH COVARIATES: `r myform_covariates`   
```{r}
myform_covariates="log10_props ~ log_npo_days_prop + bwt_z + study_group * WOL"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "Taxa", props_toTest = props_toTest_g, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, npo_days_prop, bwt_z) %>% mutate(log_npo_days_prop = log10(npo_days_prop + min(s2$npo_days_prop[s2$npo_days_prop>0])/2)), form1 = myform_covariates, rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff = 0.05)

summaries_df %>%
  filter(fdr < 0.1, grepl(":", term)) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear mixed effects models of log10 transformed relative abundance with subject id as random effect. Filtered with fdr < 0.1 and only interaction terms. Full formula: {myform_covariates}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
```

# OXYGEN USAGE  
```{r}
library(whatbacteria)
dbedit <- bind_rows(c(taxon="Klebsiella aerogenes", rank="Species", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"), 
          c(taxon="Citrobacter freundii", rank="Species", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
          c(taxon="Enterobacterales", rank="Order", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
          c(taxon="Klebsiella pneumoniae", rank="Species", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
          c(taxon="Proteus mirabilis", rank="Species", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
          c(taxon="Klebsiella oxytoca", rank="Species", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
          c(taxon="Klebsiella", rank="Genus", aerobic_status="facultative anaerobe", gram_stain="Gram-negative", doi="Google"),
           whatbacteria::taxon_phenotypes)
# bind_cols(unique(props_toTest$Taxa), what_phenotype(db = dbedit, lineage = unique(props_toTest$Taxa), phenotype ="aerobic_status")) # %>%

props_toTest <- props_toTest %>%
  mutate(aerobic_status = what_phenotype(db = dbedit, lineage = Taxa, phenotype = "aerobic_status"),
         gram_stain = what_phenotype(db = dbedit, lineage = Taxa, phenotype = "gram_stain"))
```

```{r fig.width=6.5}
props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(s2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=sumprops, x=growth_failure)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(growth_failure,aerobic_status), color=aerobic_status)) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_failure)) + 
  theme_bw() 

props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(s2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=sumprops, x=WOL)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(growth_failure,aerobic_status,WOL), fill=growth_failure, color=aerobic_status), outlier.shape=NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "lightgrey")) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_failure)) + 
  theme_bw() 

# RATIO
props_aerobic_ratio <- props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(sumpropslog = log10(sumprops)) %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
    arrange(aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(propsratio=last(sumprops)/first(sumprops), logratio=last(sumpropslog)-first(sumpropslog), numerator=last(aerobic_status), denominator=first(aerobic_status)) %>%
  inner_join(s2) 

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=growth_failure)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = growth_failure)) +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_failure)) + 
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

# props_aerobic_ratio %>%
#   ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=WOL)) +
#   geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(WOL, growth_failure), fill=growth_failure), outlier.shape=21) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_failure), hide.ns = F, label = "p.signif", method = "wilcox.test") + 
  # scale_y_log10() +
  # scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
  # theme_bw() 
```

```{r fig.width=6.5}
props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(s2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=sumprops, x=growth_cat)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(growth_cat,aerobic_status), color=aerobic_status)) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat)) + 
  theme_bw() 

props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  inner_join(s2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=sumprops, x=WOL)) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(growth_cat,aerobic_status,WOL), fill=growth_cat, color=aerobic_status), outlier.shape=NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "lightgrey", "darkgrey")) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat)) + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, WOL, growth_failure, growth_cat)) %>%
  group_by(aerobic_status, Taxa, WOL, growth_failure) %>%
    summarise(meanprop = mean(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # mutate(meanprop=sumprops/n) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=meanprop, x=WOL)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill=Taxa)) +
  # facet_wrap(~paste(growth_failure, "Failure")+aerobic_status, ncol=2) +
  facet_grid(paste(growth_failure, "Failure")~aerobic_status) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.key.height = unit(0.5, units = "cm"))

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, WOL, growth_failure, growth_cat)) %>%
  group_by(aerobic_status, Taxa, WOL, growth_cat) %>%
    summarise(meanprop = mean(props), sumpropslog=sum(log10_props), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # mutate(meanprop=sumprops/n) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=meanprop, x=WOL)) +
    geom_col(aes(fill=Taxa)) +
  facet_grid(growth_cat~aerobic_status) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "right", legend.key.height = unit(0.5, units = "cm"))

# RATIO
props_aerobic_ratio <- props_toTest %>%
  group_by(SampleID, aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(sumprops = sum(props+1e-6)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(sumpropslog = log10(sumprops)) %>%
  group_by(SampleID) %>%
    arrange(aerobic_status) %>%
    summarise(propsratio=last(sumprops)/first(sumprops), logratio=last(sumpropslog)-first(sumpropslog), numerator=last(aerobic_status), denominator=first(aerobic_status)) %>%
  inner_join(s2) 

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=growth_cat)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = growth_cat)) +
  ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat)) + 
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

summaries_df <- props_aerobic_ratio %>% 
  filter(WOL<=14, !is.na(growth_cat), !is.na(logratio)) %>%
  group_by(WOL) %>%
    # tidy(lm(data = ., formula=logratio ~ growth_cat)
    do(tidy(lm(logratio ~ growth_cat, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup()  %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residual", term)) %>%
  mutate(term=gsub("growth_cat", "", term))

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=WOL)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(WOL, growth_cat), fill=growth_cat), outlier.shape=21) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat), hide.ns = F, label = "p.signif", show.legend = T, method = "wilcox.test", position = position_jitter(height =1)) + 
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="mild retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=70)) +
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="moderate to severe retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=100)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat, guide='none') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")+
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1) %>% pander(split.tab=Inf)


summaries_df <- props_aerobic_ratio %>% 
  filter(WOL<=12, !is.na(growth_failure), !is.na(logratio)) %>%
  group_by(WOL) %>%
    # tidy(lm(data = ., formula=logratio ~ growth_cat)
    do(tidy(lm(logratio ~ growth_failure, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup()  %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residual", term)) %>%
  mutate(term=gsub("growth_failure", "", term))

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=WOL)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(WOL, growth_failure), fill=growth_failure), outlier.shape=21) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat), hide.ns = F, label = "p.signif", show.legend = T, method = "wilcox.test", position = position_jitter(height =1)) + 
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=70)) +
  # geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="moderate to severe retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=100)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure, guide='none') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1) %>% pander(split.tab=Inf)
```

```{r fig.width=6.5}
summaries_df <- props_aerobic_ratio %>% 
  filter(WOL<=14, !is.na(growth_cat), !is.na(logratio)) %>%
  group_by(MOL) %>%
    # tidy(lm(data = ., formula=logratio ~ growth_cat)
    do(tidy(lm(logratio ~ growth_cat, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup()  %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residual", term)) %>%
  mutate(term=gsub("growth_cat", "", term))

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=MOL)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(MOL, growth_cat), fill=growth_cat), outlier.shape=21) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat), hide.ns = F, label = "p.signif", show.legend = T, method = "wilcox.test", position = position_jitter(height =1)) + 
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="mild retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=70)) +
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="moderate to severe retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=100)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat, guide='none') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")+
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1) %>% pander(split.tab=Inf)


summaries_df <- props_aerobic_ratio %>% 
  filter(WOL<=12, !is.na(growth_failure), !is.na(logratio)) %>%
  group_by(MOL) %>%
    # tidy(lm(data = ., formula=logratio ~ growth_cat)
    do(tidy(lm(logratio ~ growth_failure, data=.))) %>%
  ungroup()  %>%
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residual", term)) %>%
  mutate(term=gsub("growth_failure", "", term))

props_aerobic_ratio %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=propsratio, x=MOL)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(MOL, growth_failure), fill=growth_failure), outlier.shape=21) +
  # ggpubr::stat_compare_means(mapping = aes(group = growth_cat), hide.ns = F, label = "p.signif", show.legend = T, method = "wilcox.test", position = position_jitter(height =1)) + 
  geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=70)) +
  # geom_point(data=summaries_df %>% filter(term=="moderate to severe retardation", p.value<0.1), shape=8, mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=100)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure, guide='none') +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(y="Obligate : Facultative Anaerobes ratio")

summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.1) %>% pander(split.tab=Inf)
```


\newpage
# ~ METABOLITES ~
# AGE  

# FIG 2D
Trajectory of metabolites over age (pretty summary)  
FIGURE 2 optional summary of metabolites over age  
```{r fig2eSUMMARY, fig.height = 2, fig.width =4, dpi=300}
study_group_var = "WOL"
# unique(stool_metab_toPlot$metab)
aa <- c("Tyrosine", "Alanine", "Glycine", "Isovalerate", "Phenylalanine", "Threonine", "Histidine", "Lysine", "Tryptophan", "Methionine", "Glutamine", "Glutamate", "Aspartate", "Pyroglutamate")
bcaa <- c("Isoleucine", "Leucine", "Valine")
krebs <- c("Citrate", "Succinate", "Pyruvate", "Fumarate", "Formate")
scfa <- c("Propionate", "Butyrate", "Acetate")
purines <- c("Purine", "Hypoxanthine")
sugar <- c("Galactose", "Glucose")
#Creatine
#Uracil
#Glycerol
voc <- c("Cadaverine", "Putrescine", "Dimethylamine")

# stool_metab_toPlot <- stool_metab_long %>%
#   inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_cat, growth_failure, TimePoint, SubjectID), by = "SampleID") %>% 
#   droplevels() %>%
#   mutate(metab_group = ifelse(metab %in% aa, "Amino acid", ifelse(metab %in% krebs, "Kreb's Cycle", ifelse(metab %in% scfa, "SCFA", ifelse(metab %in% purines, "Purines", ifelse(metab %in% sugar, "Sugars", ifelse(metab %in% voc, "VOC", metab)))))))

x=data.frame(t(stool_metab %>% select(!c(SampleID, redcap_id, nmr_no, `Stool weight`, Seq_run5_YN, Sequenced, in_36wklist, HOL, DOL,Inf_metBol_mlk))))
colnames(x) <- stool_metab$SampleID

# y <- x %>% rownames_to_column("metab") %>% mutate(metab_group = ifelse(metab %in% aa, "Amino acids", ifelse(metab %in% krebs, "Kreb's Cycle", ifelse(metab %in% scfa, "SCFAs", ifelse(metab %in% purines, "Purines", ifelse(metab %in% sugar, "Sugars", ifelse(metab %in% voc, "VOCs", metab)))))))

# Add number in each group:
y <- x %>% rownames_to_column("metab") %>% mutate(metab_group = ifelse(metab %in% bcaa, paste0("BCAAs (", length(bcaa), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% aa, paste0("Amino acids (", length(aa), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% krebs, paste0("Kreb's Cycle (", length(krebs), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% scfa, paste0("SCFAs (", length(scfa), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% purines, paste0("Purines (", length(purines), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% sugar, paste0("Sugars (", length(sugar), ")"), ifelse(metab %in% voc, paste0("VOCs (", length(voc), ")"), metab))))))))

metab_summarised <- rowsum(x, y$metab_group)
metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_cat, growth_failure, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(metab = reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=get(study_group_var), y=umol_g)) +
    geom_smooth(aes(group=metab, color=metab), alpha=0.2, size=0.5) + #, linetype = Taxa
    scale_color_d3(palette = "category20") +
    scale_x_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA), oob=squish, expand = c(0.01,0)) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.key.size = unit(c(0.13), units = "in"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA), 
      legend.text = element_text(size=8),
      legend.title=element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 0.3),
      axis.text = element_text(colour = "black", size=8)
      ) +
    guides(color=guide_legend(ncol=1, override.aes = list(lwd = 1, fill=NA))) +
    labs(x=study_group_var, fill="", y="umol/g")
  
ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2D_stoolmetabolites_WOL_smooth.pdf"), width = 4, height = 2, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```

```{r fig.width=4}
s2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=AbxHoursPerHOL, x=WOL)) + 
  geom_smooth(aes(color=growth_failure))+
  theme_bw()

s2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=AbxHoursPerHOL, x=WOL)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=SubjectID)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group=WOL), outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  facet_wrap(~growth_failure) +
  scale_color_discrete(guide='none') +
  theme_bw()

s2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=AbxHoursPerHOL, x=WOL)) + 
  geom_smooth(aes(color=growth_cat))+
  theme_bw()

s2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=AbxHoursPerHOL, x=WOL)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color=SubjectID)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group=WOL), outlier.shape=NA, fill=NA) +
  facet_wrap(~growth_cat) +
  scale_color_discrete(guide='none') +
  theme_bw()

pander(stool_metab_long %>% inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, WOL,growth_cat, growth_failure)) %>% select(SampleID, WOL, growth_cat, growth_failure, metab, umol_g) %>% count(WOL, growth_failure, metab) %>% group_by(WOL, growth_failure) %>% summarise(`Average Sample Size`=mean(n)) %>% ungroup(), caption = "Sample sizes in growth failure groups (averaged over all metabolites)")

pander(stool_metab_long %>% inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, WOL,growth_cat)) %>% select(SampleID, WOL, growth_cat, metab, umol_g) %>% count(WOL, growth_cat, metab) %>% group_by(WOL, growth_cat) %>% summarise(`Average Sample Size`=mean(n)) %>% ungroup(), caption = "Sample sizes in growth faltering groups (averaged over all metabolites)")

```



\newpage
SCFAs - only acetate, butyrate, propionate, lactate, formate, succinate
Trajectory of SCFAs
```{r fig2eSCFA, fig.width=7, fig.height=5}
stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab %in% c("Acetate", "Butyrate", "Propionate", "Lactate", "Succinate", "Formate")) %>%
  right_join(s2, by="SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL)) +
    geom_point(shape=21, color="darkgrey") +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group=WOL, fill=WOL), outlier.shape = NA) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g)") +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2E_stoolSCFAs_WOL_boxplots.pdf"), width = 7, height = 5, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)

```

\newpage
## Linear model  
Metabolite change with age  
```{r}
props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL"
# form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + npo_days_prop"
# form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form1,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  arrange(fdr) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

```


\newpage
# All age significant metabolites  
```{r fig2eSIG, fig.width=15, fig.height=6}
sig_metab <- summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05, term == "WOL") %>% pull(metab)
stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab %in% sig_metab) %>%
  right_join(s2, by="SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab)) %>%
  left_join(summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.05, term == "WOL"), by = "metab") %>%
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(median=median(umol_g), max=max(umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL)) +
    geom_point(shape=21, color="darkgrey") +
    geom_boxplot(aes(group=WOL, fill=WOL), outlier.shape=NA) +
    geom_text(mapping = aes(label = paste0("q=", scientific(fdr, digits = 2)), x=8, y=max*.99), size = 3, check_overlap = T) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free", ncol=7) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(alpha=0.8) +
  scale_y_continuous(transform="log10") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2E_stoolmetabolites_fdr05_WOL_boxplots.pdf"), width = 15, height = 6, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```


# All metabolites squiggles  
```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
lod=min(stool_metab_long %>% pull(umol_g), na.rm = T)
stool_metab_long %>% select(!HOL) %>%
  right_join(s2, by = "SampleID") %>%
  mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = growth_cat, labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(growth_cat), !is.na(metab), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=HOL)) +
    # geom_hline(aes(yintercept = lod),  lty=2) +
    geom_point(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=`Growth Faltering`, group = `Growth Faltering`), se = F) +  
    scale_color_manual(values = as.character(ann_colors$growth_cat)) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", limits = c(lod, NA), labels = signif) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=7, scales="free_y") +
  # labs(y="Relative Abundance", x="Hours of Life")
 labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")

ggsave(here("Output", "NEW_ALL_stoolmetabolites_GrFaltering.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)

stool_metab_long %>% select(!HOL) %>%
  right_join(s2, by = "SampleID") %>%
  # mutate(`Growth Faltering` = factor(x = growth_cat, labels = c("none", "mild faltering", "moderate to severe faltering"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(growth_cat), !is.na(metab), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=HOL)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=growth_failure), alpha=0.1) +
    geom_smooth(aes(color=growth_failure, group=growth_failure), se = F) +  
    scale_color_manual(values = as.character(ann_colors$growth_failure)) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10", limits = c(lod, NA), labels = signif) +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size=10, color="black"), axis.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), strip.text = element_text(size=8, color="black"), legend.text = element_text(size=10, color="black")) +    
  facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=7, scales="free_y") +
  # labs(y="Relative Abundance", x="Hours of Life")
 labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)", color="Growth failure")

ggsave(here("Output", "NEW_ALL_stoolmetabolites_GrFailure.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8, useDingbats = F, dpi = 600)
```

\newpage
# SUPP FIGURE 3A - Metabolites over age by growth category   
## Linear models (grouped metabs)
```{r}
props_toTest <- metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  # inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_cat, growth_failure, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g + min(metab_summarised[metab_summarised>0])/10))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat"
form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + npo_days_prop"
form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_cat, growth_failure, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), form1 = form1, rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff = .05) 

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of groups of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

```

```{r supp3a, fig.height=5, fig.width=7}
metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_cat, growth_failure, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(metab = reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, growth_cat) %>%
  mutate(mean=mean(umol_g), sd=sd(umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  arrange(growth_cat) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL, group=growth_cat, color=growth_cat)) +
    geom_point(size=1.2, aes(shape=growth_cat), alpha=0.5) +
    geom_smooth(size=0.8, aes(fill=growth_cat), se=F) +
    # geom_point(size=1, aes(y=mean,shape=growth_cat)) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free") +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 23)) +
   # scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA),oob=squish) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", , panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill="Growth", color="Growth", shape="Growth", y='Concentration (umol/g)')
ggsave(here("Output", "SUPP_FIG3A_stoolmetabolites_growthcat_grouped.pdf"), width = 7, height = 5, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```

## Week by week  
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=23) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (WOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

## Monthly  
(every 4 weeks)   
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(maxmean=max(mean), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, MOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*1.25)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*1.25)), shape=23) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*1.3)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*1.3)), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)", title = "")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (MOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  # filter(p.value < 0.1) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

\newpage
# FIG 2E - select metabolites over time by growth category  
## Linear model - growth cateogry change with age
Growth category change with age  
```{r}
props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat"
form1m = "log10_umol_g ~ MOL * growth_cat"
form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + npo_days_prop"
form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

# Growth category WOL
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form1,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff = .05) 
summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

# Growth category MOL
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form1m,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff = .05) 
summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1m}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

```

```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=8}
# sig_metab <- summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.2) %>% pull(metab)
stool_metab_long %>%
  # filter(metab %in% unique(summaries_df$metab)) %>%
  filter(metab %in% c("Butyrate", "Propionate", "Isovalerate", "Dimethylamine")) %>%
  right_join(s2, by="SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, growth_cat) %>%
  mutate(mean=mean(umol_g), sd=sd(umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  arrange(growth_cat) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL, group=growth_cat, color=growth_cat)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=growth_cat), alpha=0.5) +
    geom_smooth(aes(fill=growth_cat), se=F) +
    # geom_point(aes(y=mean, shape=growth_failure)) +
    # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se)) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free_y", ncol=7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 24)) +
   # scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA),oob=squish) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill="Growth Category", color="Growth Category", shape="Growth Category", y='Concentration (umol/g)')
ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2E_metabolites_age_growthcategory_subset.pdf"), width = 8, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```

## Week by week  
\newpage
```{r fig.height=14, fig.width=9, out.width="5.5in"}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, WOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=23) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (WOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

## Monthly  
\newpage
```{r fig.height=14, fig.width=9, out.width="5.5in"}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups>=2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
```
