```{r fig.height=14, fig.width=9, out.width="5.5in"}
  group_by(metab, MOL, max) %>%
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_cat, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(aes(color=study_group)) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=35), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[2]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=35), shape=23) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=20), shape=8) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr>=0.1, p.value<0.05, term==levels(s2$growth_cat)[3]), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=20), shape=23) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (MOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

\newpage
```{r suppfig3b, fig.width=10, fig.height=8, eval=T}
# SUPP FIGURE 3B - Metabolites (all) over time by growth failure   
# Supp 3A but no grouping
stool_metab_long %>%
  right_join(s2, by="SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, growth_failure) %>%
  mutate(mean=mean(umol_g), sd=sd(umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  arrange(growth_failure) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL, group=growth_failure, color=growth_failure)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=growth_failure), alpha=0.7) +
    geom_smooth(aes(fill=growth_failure), se=F) +
    # geom_point(aes(y=mean, shape=growth_failure)) +
    # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se)) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free_y", ncol=7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24)) +
   # scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA),oob=squish) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill="Growth Failure", color="Growth Failure", shape="Growth Failure", y='Concentration (umol/g)')
ggsave(here("Output", "SUPP_FIG3B_stoolmetabolites_growthfailure_ungrouped.pdf"), width = 10, height = 8, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```
## Metabolites (all) over time by growth failure Linear models  
Growth failure change with age  
```{r}
props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_failure"
form1m = "log10_umol_g ~ MOL * growth_failure"
form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_failure + npo_days_prop"
form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_failure + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

# Growth failure WOL
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form1,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff = .05) 
summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

# Growth failure MOL
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form1m,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff = .05) 
summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form1m}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))
table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")
```

# alt SUPP FIG 3b - grouped

```{r supp3bGROUPED, fig.height=5, fig.width=7, eval=T}
props_toTest <- metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g + min(metab_summarised[metab_summarised>0])/10))

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest %>% filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol"), s_toTest = s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_failure",rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff = 1) 
table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_SuppFig6C_")

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: log10_umol_g ~ WOL"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(metab = reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, growth_failure) %>%
  mutate(mean=mean(umol_g), sd=sd(umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  arrange(growth_failure) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL, group=growth_failure, color=growth_failure)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=growth_failure), alpha=0.5) +
    geom_smooth(size=1, aes(fill=growth_failure), se=F) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free") +
    # scale_color_aaas() +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    # scale_fill_aaas() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24)) +
   # scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA),oob=squish) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill="Growth Failure", color="Growth Failure", shape="Growth Failure", y='Concentration (umol/g)')
ggsave(here("Output", "SUPP_FIG3A_stoolmetabolites_growthfail_grouped.pdf"), width = 7, height = 5, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```


## Week by week  
```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups==2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, WOL, max) %>%
  # summarise(n=n())
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(shape=21) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=8, color="darkred") +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^(max)+5), shape=23, color="red", fill="yellow") +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    scale_color_aaas() +
    # scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (WOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```


## Monthly  
```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups==2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, MOL, max) %>%
  # summarise(n=n())
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(shape=21) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=8, color="darkred") +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10^(max)+5), shape=23, color="red", fill="yellow") +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    scale_color_aaas() +
    # scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=4, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (MOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

## Week by week grouped metabolites   
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

props_toTest <- metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g + min(metab_summarised[metab_summarised>0])/10))

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, WOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups==2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, WOL, max) %>%
  # summarise(n=n())
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, WOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, WOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=WOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(shape=21) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^(max*1.75)), shape=8, color="darkred") +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=23, color="darkred") +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=WOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    scale_color_aaas() +
    # scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (WOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

## Monthly grouped metabolites   
```{r fig.height=9, fig.width=8}
myform="log10_umol_g ~ study_group"

props_toTest <- metab_summarised %>%
  rownames_to_column("metab") %>%
  pivot_longer(!metab, names_to = "SampleID", values_to = "umol_g") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g + min(metab_summarised[metab_summarised>0])/10))

summaries_df <- props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group), metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(mean=mean(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab) %>% mutate(max=max(mean)) %>% ungroup() %>%
  
  group_by(metab, MOL) %>%
    mutate(ngroups=n_distinct(study_group)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(ngroups==2) %>% # Only test PMA_rounded where you have both study groups
  
  group_by(metab, MOL, max) %>%
  # summarise(n=n())
    do(tidy(lm(as.formula(myform), data=.))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|Residuals", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = sub("study_group", "", term)) %>%
  
  group_by(term, MOL) %>%
    mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

props_toTest %>%
  inner_join(s2 %>% select(SampleID, study_group=growth_failure, sample_type=SampleType, TimePoint, SubjectID, MOL, AbxHoursPerHOL), by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(study_group)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = reorder(metab, -log10_umol_g)) %>%
  mutate(Taxa = fct_relabel(Taxa, function(x) gsub(" ", "\n", x))) %>%
  group_by(MOL, metab, study_group, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean=mean(log10_umol_g), sd=sd(log10_umol_g), n=n(), max=max(log10_umol_g)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se=sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=10^(mean), x=MOL)) +
    # geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PMA_rounded), lwd=0.3, color="grey") + # guide lines
    geom_line(aes(color=study_group, group = study_group)) +  
    geom_point(shape=21) +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10), shape=8, color="darkred") +
    geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(p.value<0.05), mapping = aes(x=MOL, y=10), shape=23, color="darkred") +
    # geom_point(data = summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.1, term=="moderate to severe retardation"), mapping = aes(color=term, x=MOL, y=10^(max*2)), shape=8) +
    scale_color_aaas() +
    # scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_y_continuous(transform = "log10") +
    theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = 10^(mean-se), ymax=10^(mean+se), color=study_group), alpha=0.5, width = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, ncol=3, scales="free_y") +
  labs(y="Concentration (umol/g log-scale)")
```

Linear models were used to estimate the differences between study groups at each week of life. The relative abundances were log10 transformed. Multiple tests were adjusted for false discovery rate using Benjamini-Hochberg method. Only the terms with p<0.1 are shown in the table below.

For each week of life (MOL):  
lm(`r myform`)

```{r}
# table_export(summaries_df, "Taxonomic_table_export")

summaries_df %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.tab=Inf, emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05)) #%>%
  #column_spec(c(2:5), width = "3em") ## if the table is running off the page, you can manually specify the width of the columns

rm(myform)
```

\newpage
# FIG 2F - select metabolites over time by growth failure  
```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=8}
# sig_metab <- summaries_df %>% filter(fdr<0.2) %>% pull(metab)
stool_metab_long %>%
  # filter(metab %in% unique(summaries_df$metab)) %>%
  filter(metab %in% c("Butyrate", "Propionate", "Isovalerate", "Dimethylamine")) %>%
  right_join(s2, by="SampleID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(metab), metab!="Glycerol") %>%
  group_by(WOL, metab, growth_failure) %>%
  mutate(mean=mean(umol_g), sd=sd(umol_g), n=n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(se = sd/sqrt(n)) %>%
  mutate(metab = fct_reorder(metab, -umol_g)) %>%
  arrange(growth_failure) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=umol_g, x=WOL, group=growth_failure, color=growth_failure)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=growth_failure), alpha=0.5) +
    geom_smooth(aes(fill=growth_failure), se=F) +
    # geom_point(aes(y=mean, shape=growth_failure)) +
    # geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean-se, ymax=mean+se)) +
    facet_wrap(~metab, scales="free_y", ncol=7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24)) +
   # scale_y_continuous(limit=c(0,NA),oob=squish) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(fill="Growth Failure", color="Growth Failure", shape="Growth Failure", y='Concentration (umol/g)')
ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2F_metabolites_age_growthFail_subset.pdf"), width = 8, height = 3, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```


\newpage
# FIG 2C Linear model estimate lineplot log10_umol_g ~ growth_cat  
```{r}
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = stool_metab_long %>% filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>% mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g)), s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ growth_cat", rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  1) %>% mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) #%>% filter(!grepl(":", term))

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: log10_umol_g ~ growth_cat"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(Significance = ifelse(fdr < 0.05, "q<0.05", "q>0.05")) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Value, y=fct_inorder(metab), color=term, group=term)) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), lty=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(xmin = Value - Std.Error, xmax=Value + Std.Error), position=position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=Significance), size=2, position=position_dodge(0.8)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 16)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_cat) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(color="", y="Metabolite", x="Estimate", title="log10_umol_g ~ growth_cat")
  
ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2C_Metab_GrowthCat_LinearModEst.pdf"), width = 5, height = 8, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```

\newpage
# FIG 2X Linear model estimate lineplot
```{r}
summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = stool_metab_long %>% filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>% mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g)), s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ growth_failure", rep_mes_label = "SubjectID", p_cutoff =  1) %>% mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) #%>% filter(!grepl(":", term))

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  arrange(p.value) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: log10_umol_g ~ growth_failure)"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(Significance = ifelse(fdr < 0.05, "q<0.05", ifelse(fdr<0.1, "q<0.1", "q>0.05"))) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Value, y=fct_inorder(metab), color=term, group=term)) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = 0), lty=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(xmin = Value - Std.Error, xmax=Value + Std.Error), position=position_dodge(0.8)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=Significance), size=2, position=position_dodge(0.8)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 16)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_failure) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(color="", y="Metabolite", x="Estimate", title="log10_umol_g ~ growth_failure")
  
ggsave(here("Output", "FIG2D_Metab_GrowthFail_LinearModEst.pdf"), width = 5, height = 8, useDingbats = F, dpi = 400)
```

\newpage
Growth category over time with NPO days  
```{r}
### Linear models of metabolites
# number_of_top_pathways = 25
props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat"
form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + npo_days_prop"
form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form2,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form2}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

# table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

```

\newpage
Growth category over time with Abx hours  
```{r}
### Linear models of metabolites
# number_of_top_pathways = 25
props_toTest <- stool_metab_long %>%
  filter(metab != "Glycerol") %>%
  mutate(log10_umol_g = log10(umol_g))

form1 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat"
form2 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + npo_days_prop"
form3 = "log10_umol_g ~ WOL * growth_cat + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

summaries_df <- run_lmer_on_props(factor_to_test = "metab", props_toTest = props_toTest, s_toTest = s_toTest, form1 = form3,rep_mes_label = random1, p_cutoff =  0.05) 

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_cat")) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log10 transformed concentrations of metabolites. Filtered with p.value < 0.05. SubjectID added as a random effect. Full formula: {form3}"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

# table_export(summaries_df, "metabolites_analysis_table_")

```



\newpage

# End of report

```{r Generate time stamped report, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#notes
#neat: you can run this following command in the console to give your reports custom names (or date-stamp them)
#rmarkdown::render('ronen_stein_Report_shotgun.Rmd',output_file = paste('CEASE.report.', Sys.Date(), '.pdf', sep=''))

rstudioapi::documentSaveAll()

script_dir <- file.path("Scripts","Rmds")
output_dir <- file.path("Output")

report_fp <- here::here(script_dir, "FIGURESANDTABLES.Rmd")
output_fp <- here::here(output_dir, paste('sagori_microbiome_figures_and_tables_', Sys.Date(), '.pdf', sep=''))

rmarkdown::render(report_fp, output_file = output_fp)

```
